name: FindCorrectionParameters
description: Finds the coordinate correction parameters (Cx, Cy) from a PostGIS table row. Returns the centroid of the selected row as text strings for use as false-origin correction in geometry query components.

inputParameters.name: Schema
inputParameters.description: Schema where the table is located.

inputParameters.name: Column
inputParameters.description: Column where a specific value can be searched (optional — omit for first row).

inputParameters.name: Value
inputParameters.description: Value to be searched (optional — omit for first row).

outputParameters.name: Cx
outputParameters.description: Correction X — positioning correction parameter on the X axis to bring geometries closer to the origin.

outputParameters.name: Cy
outputParameters.description: Correction Y — positioning correction parameter on the Y axis to bring geometries closer to the origin.

outputParameters.name: report
outputParameters.description: Exceptions — displays errors on the query.
